title: cynanchica graveolens
intro: Cynanchica graveolens, also known as the Mexican climbing milkweed, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Cynanchica graveolens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
